title: verbascum orbicularifolium
intro: Verbascum orbicularifolium, also known as the round-leaved mullein, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mullein genus. The leaves and flowers of this plant are used in traditional herbal medicine, and it is valued for its expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The medicinal properties of Verbascum orbicularifolium make it beneficial for treating various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and skin irritations. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
